summary.headline: Bunge announces early participation results of exchange offers and consent solicitations for Viterra notes.
summary.narrative_summary: Bunge's subsidiary BLFC received consents from holders representing over 96.5% in principal amount of certain existing Viterra notes, allowing the company to amend indentures governing these notes.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Announcement of early participation results in exchange offers and consent solicitations for Viterra notes.

extraction_notes: Numbers from press release; cover sheet only had Item references
